messages.text: Congratulations! May your love story be endless and beautiful. 📖💕
flow: 💍 Wedding bells are ringing in the distance...
📖 Someone has been following your love story...
💕 They think it's the most beautiful tale ever told...
🎊 Congratulations are in order...
💫 Here's their wedding wish for you... 💫

messages.text: Wishing you a lifetime of laughter and love. 💑
flow: 💒 A beautiful wedding blessing is floating your way...
😂 Someone wishes you a lifetime of laughter...
💑 And a forever filled with love...
🎉 The celebration is just beginning...
💫 Open this message for your blessing... 💫

messages.text: May your marriage be filled with all the right ingredients: love, laughter, and happiness. 🍰
flow: 🍰 Someone's baking up the perfect marriage recipe...
❤️ The secret ingredients? Love...
😂 Laughter...
😊 And happiness...
💫 Here's their wedding wish recipe... 💫

messages.text: Two hearts, one love. Congratulations on your wedding day! ❤️
flow: ❤️ Two hearts beating as one...
💑 Someone noticed how perfect you are together...
🎊 Your wedding day is finally here...
💝 They've been waiting to congratulate you...
💫 Open for your heartwarming message... 💫

messages.text: May the love you share today grow stronger as you grow old together. 🌱
flow: 🌱 A tiny seed of love was planted...
💕 It's grown into something beautiful...
🌳 Someone watches your love grow every day...
🎋 They have a wish for your future together...
💫 Here's their growing love message... 💫

teaser: Beautiful wedding wishes for the happy couple

messages.text: Congratulations! May your love story be endless and beautiful. 📖💕
Wishing you a lifetime of laughter and love. 💑
May your marriage be filled with all the right ingredients: love, laughter, and happiness. 🍰
Two hearts, one love. Congratulations on your wedding day! ❤️
May the love you share today grow stronger as you grow old together. 🌱
Congratulations! You've found your happily ever after. 👑
May your marriage be a beautiful dance of love and respect. 💃🕺
Wishing you joy, love, and happiness on your wedding day and always. 🎉
Love is not about how many days you have been together, but how much you love each other every day. 📅❤️
Congratulations! May your love be modern enough to survive the times and old-fashioned enough to last forever. ⏰
May the bond you share today be the foundation of your forever. 🏠
Here's to love, laughter, and your happily ever after! 🥂
May your marriage be a source of endless joy and beautiful memories. 📸
Congratulations on finding your partner in crime for life! 👮❤️
Wishing you a lifetime of shared sunsets and morning coffees. 🌅☕
May your love story inspire others to believe in true love. 📖✨
Congratulations! You've just leveled up to life's best adventure. 🎮
May the love you share multiply with each passing day. 📈❤️
Wishing you both the wedding of your dreams and the marriage of a lifetime. 💭
Congratulations! Now the real fun begins! 🎊
May your marriage be filled with more laughter than arguments. 😂
Here's to love, laughter, and not having to sleep alone anymore! 🛏️
May your biggest fight be over the remote control. 📺
Congratulations! You've officially found your favorite person to annoy forever. 😜
Wishing you both a lifetime of Netflix and chill. 📺❄️
May your love be as endless as your Netflix queue. 📺
Congratulations! You've just won the lottery of love. 🎰❤️
May your marriage be blessed with patience, understanding, and lots of pizza. 🍕
Wishing you both the perfect blend of romance and friendship. 👫
Congratulations! May your arguments be short and your makeups be long. 💋
